2606.20137.title: PASQA: Pitch-Accent-Focused Speech Quality Assessment Model Trained on Synthetic Speech with Accent Errors
2606.20137.paper_summary: Existing mean opinion score (MOS) prediction models typically predict utterance-level naturalness MOS and can be insensitive to localized pitch-accent errors. We propose Pitch-Accent-focused Speech Quality Assessment (PASQA), which explicitly targets pitch-accent correctness. To train our model, we construct a controlled Japanese accent-error dataset by changing accent patterns using an accent-controllable text-to-speech system, and compute a pseudo accent-quality score from the accent-error rate. PASQA builds on self-supervised representations and employs mora-conditioned fusion, ranking loss, an auxiliary accent-error localization task, and speaker-invariant training. Experiments show that conventional models fail to preserve the ordering by accent-error severity, whereas PASQA achieves high ordering accuracy on both seen and unseen speakers. Further, PASQA shows stronger agreement with human accent-correctness judgments. The code is available at https://github.com/lycorp-jp/PASQA.
2606.20137.paper_summary_zh: 現有的平均意見分數 (MOS) 預測模型通常預測話語級別的自然度 MOS，並且對於局部的音調重音錯誤可能不夠敏感。<lb/>我們提出了以音調重音為重點的語音質量評估 (PASQA)，該模型明確針對音調重音的正確性。<lb/>為了訓練我們的模型，我們通過使用可控音調的文本轉語音系統改變音調模式，構建了一個受控的日語音調錯誤數據集，並根據音調錯誤率計算出一個偽音調質量分數。<lb/>PASQA 基於自我監督的表示，並採用了音節條件融合、排名損失、一個輔助的音調錯誤定位任務，以及說話者不變的訓練。<lb/>實驗顯示，傳統模型未能保持音調錯誤嚴重程度的排序，而 PASQA 在已知和未知的說話者上都達到了高排序準確性。<lb/>此外，PASQA 與人類的音調正確性判斷有更強的一致性。<lb/>代碼可在 https://github.com/lycorp-jp/PASQA 獲得。
2606.20137.author: Masaya Kawamura et.al.
2606.20137.authors: Masaya Kawamura, Yuma Shirahata, Kentaro Mitsui, Reo Shimizu
